user.title: Directional RF Fan
user.description: Select the RF transmitter and a fan slot. Slot 1 and 2 are real captured remotes; slot 3 to 10 are synthetic remotes. Manual hex code fields are only shown when Manual is selected.

manual.title: Manual RF codes
manual.description: Enter the six hex codes for this fan. The flow will then learn the fan with the On code.

learn_prepare.title: Learn fan

learn_send_failed.title: Sending failed
learn_send_failed.description: The On signal could not be sent. Check the RF transmitter and try again.

learn_confirm.title: Confirm learning
learn_confirm.description: Was the fan learned with slot {slot}, profile {profile}, address {address}?

progress.send_learning_signal: Sending the On signal for about 6 seconds.

error.invalid_rf_code: RF codes must be hexadecimal or binary.
error.learning_failed: Learning was not confirmed. Select another slot or use Manual.
error.learning_send_failed: The On signal could not be sent.

abort.no_transmitters: No radio frequency transmitters are available.

step_up.name: Step up
step_up.description: Send the plus command for the current or selected airflow preset.

step_down.name: Step down
step_down.description: Send the minus command for the current or selected airflow preset.

recalibrate.name: Recalibrate
recalibrate.description: Send six minus commands for the current or selected airflow preset and set Home Assistant's optimistic state to level 1.
